title: Master v0.5.5 Tester Shared Database Count Fix
notes:
Changes:
- Adds robust shared database reader for Tester publish prep.
- Supports multiple database shapes:
  items
  data.items
  database.items
  itemDatabase.items
  itemDb.items
  savedItems
  allItems
  nested item arrays
- Blocks Prepare Tester Publish if it cannot confirm item count.
- Blocks Auto Publish Tester Small Update if item count is 0.
- Shows sample item names in the result so you can verify it found the real database.
- Keeps Tester Update tab safety flags.
